<!-- seeded-by-willverse-pipeline: remove this line to stop pipeline updates -->
__NOTOC__
<div style="text-align:center; font-size:120%; margin:0.5em 0">
Welcome to the '''Willverse Wiki''' — a spoiler-safe, source-grounded encyclopedia for Will
Wight's connected universe.
</div>

<div style="text-align:center; color:#555; margin-bottom:1em">
'''{{NUMBEROFARTICLES}}''' articles · '''{{PAGESINCATEGORY:Characters}}''' characters · 26 books · all facts verified verbatim against the text
</div>

{| style="width:100%; border-collapse:collapse; text-align:center"
|- style="vertical-align:top"
| style="width:25%; padding:10px; background:#f8f9fa; border:1px solid #eaecf0" | [[File:Cover-tg-01-house-of-blades.jpg|120px|link=House of Blades (novel)]]<br>'''[[House of Blades (novel)|The Traveler's Gate]]'''<br><small>3 books</small>
| style="width:25%; padding:10px; background:#f8f9fa; border:1px solid #eaecf0" | [[File:Cover-ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow.jpg|120px|link=Of Sea and Shadow (novel)]]<br>'''[[Of Sea and Shadow (novel)|The Elder Empire]]'''<br><small>6 books</small>
| style="width:25%; padding:10px; background:#f8f9fa; border:1px solid #eaecf0" | [[File:Cover-cradle-01-unsouled.jpg|120px|link=Unsouled (novel)]]<br>'''[[Unsouled (novel)|Cradle]]'''<br><small>13 books</small>
| style="width:25%; padding:10px; background:#f8f9fa; border:1px solid #eaecf0" | [[File:Cover-lh-01-the-captain.jpg|120px|link=The Captain (novel)]]<br>'''[[The Captain (novel)|The Last Horizon]]'''<br><small>4 books</small>
|}

== 🛡️ Set your spoiler level ==
'''This wiki will not spoil you.''' Use the '''"Spoiler level"''' selector at the top of any
article to set how far you've read '''in each series independently'''. Every fact is tagged with
the book that reveals it; anything past your progress stays hidden. See [[Project:About]].

== ✨ Explore ==
* '''Magic systems:''' [[Sacred Arts]] (Cradle) · [[Reading and the Soulbound]] (Elder Empire) · [[Traveling and the Territories]] (Traveler's Gate) · [[Spellcraft]] (The Last Horizon)
* '''Browse:''' [[:Category:Characters|Characters]] · [[:Category:Locations|Locations]] · [[:Category:Groups|Groups]] · [[:Category:Magic systems|Magic systems]] · [[:Category:Timelines|Timelines]] · [[:Category:Books|Books]]
* '''[[Willverse books]]''' — every book & reading order

== ✅ Every fact is grounded ==
Seeded from the books themselves: each fact's supporting quote is verified '''verbatim''' in the
text, an independent judge confirms the quote supports the claim, and prose is original summary —
never copied, never invented. After seeding, editors own the wiki; the pipeline never overwrites
human edits.

{{Willverse books nav}}

[[Category:Meta]]
